overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player moves from a covered elevated walkway overlooking a highway, exits to an open intersection, crosses the street among futuristic vehicles, and continues along neon-lit sidewalks past pedestrians and holographic advertisements. The scene features heavy neon lighting with wet streets reflecting colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with highway view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: concrete and metal overhead structure with exposed beams and piping
long horizontal window showing multi-lane highway with blue lighting below
illuminated yellow vending machine with 'Insta-Food' signage and warning labels
concrete wall covered in red and white graffiti tags
continuous warm yellow LED strip lighting along the base of the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. The walkway features concrete walls with graffiti, yellow neon floor lighting, and views of a highway below through long horizontal windows. An Insta-Food vending machine stands illuminated on the right side as the camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of busy urban intersection

events.description: exits the covered walkway into an open overlook area with views of the intersection below

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit of the walkway and pausing briefly to overlook the traffic below before descending

entered.detail: illuminated corporate signage for 'DELAMAIN' on building facade
open view of multi-lane intersection with futuristic vehicles and crosswalks below
large glowing advertisements including 'AVANTE' and other corporate displays

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway onto an elevated overlook platform. The Delamain building sign becomes visible on the right while the open intersection spreads out below, showing moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles. Holographic billboards illuminate the right side as the space transitions from enclosed to open, with the sky becoming partially visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: descends from elevated overlook to street level and steps onto the crosswalk
camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: descending to street level, crossing the multi-lane intersection among futuristic vehicles, and looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in colorful jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall glass and steel buildings covered in illuminated windows and massive holographic displays
glowing teal corporate signage reading 'softsys' on building facade
yellow and black striped concrete barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level and enters the busy intersection, crossing among futuristic vehicles including a red sports car. The scene opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements including 'AVANTE' and 'softsys'. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the buildings before continuing across the wet asphalt crosswalk with other pedestrians.

events.description: passes by a pedestrian standing near a building entrance while continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past various storefronts, vending machines, and neon signs, occasionally passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and purple hair standing near building entrance looking at device
pedestrian in brown coat walking in opposite direction along sidewalk

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement with yellow tactile paving strips near building entrances
large illuminated red signage reading 'CIRQUE' with additional neon elements
glowing shop windows displaying various goods and advertisements
massive suspended digital billboard displaying colorful tropical imagery spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the wet concrete sidewalk of the commercial district, passing the 'CIRQUE' neon sign and various storefronts. A massive overhead holographic screen spans the street ahead displaying tropical imagery. The camera passes pedestrians including one in a red jacket standing near a building entrance. The street is lined with traffic barriers on one side and building facades with illuminated windows on the other, creating an urban canyon effect with mostly blocked sky visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic, enclosed walkway into the vast, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins moving steadily through a covered pedestrian bridge characterized by graffiti-covered concrete and yellow neon floor lighting, passing an illuminated Insta-Food vending machine. As the camera exits the enclosure onto an elevated platform, the space opens up to reveal the Delamain building sign and a sprawling intersection of futuristic traffic below. The scene then shifts as the camera descends to street level, crossing a wet asphalt intersection among sleek vehicles and pedestrians. Finally, the view tilts upward to reveal the towering scale of skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements for AVANTE and softsys under the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense commercial district that emphasizes the claustrophobic, neon-drenched atmosphere of an urban canyon. It begins by gliding along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing the glowing CIRQUE neon sign and a series of illuminated storefronts. As the camera advances, the view is dominated by a massive overhead holographic screen displaying tropical imagery that spans the width of the street. The movement continues past pedestrians, including a figure in a red jacket, while the surrounding traffic barriers and towering building facades further restrict the visibility of the night sky.
